subject: Warp 1.09 sporadic crashing before starting processing
body:
Hello any and all,

I'm running into an issue with crashing of Warp-v1.0.9 before it even 
starts processing.

After clicking a few check-boxes and setting parameters, the program will 
briefly a hang, the load animation will circle the cursor, and then crash.
It doesn't seem to be the result of a particular order of clicks, but after 
5-6 clicks the crash occurs.

Unfortunately, there isn't an error message window that pops-up after the 
crash to help with diagnosis.

Is anyone familiar with this sort of behavior/issue and have potential 
possible solutions to attempt to resolve it? 


Since the crashing is in the absence of processing, I wouldn't think the 
hardware would an issue but here it is if it helps:

The build is:

OS: MS Windows 10 Pro N version: 10.0.18363 Build 18363
CPU: AMD EPYC 7252
RAM: 128 Gb
GPUs: Titan RTX
           Quadro RTX 4000

Thanks for the help,

-Tom
